rationale: Educ. Code §38.024 governs school district student-injury insurance. It has no operative relationship to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The board of trustees of a school district may obtain insurance against bodily injuries sustained by students while training for or engaging in interschool athletic competition or while engaging in school-sponsored activities.
_note: Rule text concerns student injury insurance; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
